skill.name: product-hunt-launch
skill.description: Product Hunt launch optimization with specific specs, timing, and gallery strategy. Covers taglines, gallery images, maker comments, and launch day tactics. Use for: product launches, startup launches, side project launches, Product Hunt optimization. Triggers: product hunt, ph launch, product hunt launch, launch strategy, product launch, startup launch, product hunt tips, product hunt gallery, ph optimization, launch day, product hunt maker
skill.summary: A comprehensive guide for launching on Product Hunt including listing specs, gallery image recommendations, tagline formulas, timing strategies, and launch day playbook.
skill.author: inference-sh-9

security_audit.summary: This is a legitimate Product Hunt launch guide skill. The static scanner flagged numerous patterns that are false positives: code fences were misidentified as shell backticks, hardcoded URLs are informational references to the inference.sh CLI (not data exfiltration), and cryptographic algorithm alerts were triggered by documentation text about SHA-256 checksums. The only true positive is the 'curl | sh' installation pattern on line 14, which is a standard CLI installation method with a hardcoded, trusted URL. No malicious intent detected.

medium_findings.title: Pipe to Shell Installation Pattern
medium_findings.description: The skill references a 'curl | sh' installation command for the inference.sh CLI. This is a standard installation pattern used by many legitimate CLI tools (Docker, Node.js, etc.). The URL is hardcoded and points to a trusted domain (inference.sh).
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern detected but is standard practice for CLI tool installation. Hardcoded URL from trusted source, not user-controlled input. No command injection risk.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: The skill contains hardcoded URLs to inference.sh services. These are informational references to recommended tools, not network requests for data exfiltration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs are static references to documentation/installation, not dynamic network requests sending user data anywhere.

content.user_title: Launch Your Product on Product Hunt
content.value_statement: This skill provides comprehensive guidance for launching on Product Hunt, covering listing specifications, gallery image generation, tagline optimization, timing strategies, and a complete launch day playbook to maximize your chances of success.
actual_capabilities: Provides listing specifications (tagline 60 chars, description 260 chars, gallery 8 images)
Recommends gallery image dimensions and content strategy for each position
Offers proven tagline formulas with examples
Suggests optimal launch timing (Tuesday-Thursday at 12:01 AM PT)
Includes maker comment template and structure
Provides complete launch day timeline with engagement rules
limitations: Does not actually post to Product Hunt - only provides guidance
Does not generate images directly - references external inference.sh CLI
Does not guarantee product visibility or success
Content is based on general best practices, not insider knowledge

use_cases.title: First-time Product Hunt launch
use_cases.description: A founder preparing for their first Product Hunt launch who needs to understand listing specs, image requirements, and launch timing.
use_cases.target_user: Startup founders, indie hackers launching their first product

use_cases.title: Gallery image guidance
use_cases.description: Someone needing to create compelling gallery images who wants to understand what content works best for each position.
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams, solo founders with design skills

use_cases.title: Launch day playbook
use_cases.description: A maker who wants a clear timeline and engagement strategy for launch day to maximize visibility and engagement.
use_cases.target_user: Any Product Hunt maker wanting structured launch day guidance

prompt_templates.title: Get Product Hunt listing specs
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the Product Hunt listing specifications? Include tagline character limit, description length, gallery image dimensions, and topic limits.

prompt_templates.title: Create tagline formula
prompt_templates.prompt: My product is [describe your product]. Help me create 5 tagline options using the formulas from the skill: action for audience, result without pain, tool that benefit.

prompt_templates.title: Plan gallery images
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me plan my Product Hunt gallery images. My product is [describe]. What should each of the 5 recommended gallery images show?

prompt_templates.title: Draft maker comment
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me write a maker comment for my Product Hunt launch. My product does [description], I built it because [reason], and the key feature is [feature]. Structure it according to the recommended format.

output_examples.input: What are the best times to launch on Product Hunt?
output_examples.output: The optimal time is Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday at 12:01 AM PT. This gives you the full 24 hours in the running for the daily top spot, ensures your product appears in the morning email digest for US users, and allows engagement across all US time zones. Avoid weekends and major tech events.

output_examples.input: Help me create a tagline for my AI writing tool
output_examples.output:
Here are tagline options using proven formulas:

1. Action for audience: 'AI writing assistant for busy marketers'
2. Result without pain: 'Beautiful drafts in minutes, not hours'
3. Tool that benefit: 'Writing tool that edits itself'

Remember: 60 characters max, no period at end, communicate what it does AND why someone should care.

best_practices: Post your maker comment within 5 minutes of going live to establish immediate engagement
Use the recommended gallery image positions strategically - position 1 must stop the scroll and communicate what the product does
Reply to every single comment - makers who engage get more visibility
anti_patterns: Launching on Friday or weekend when traffic is lowest
Asking for upvotes directly - this violates Product Hunt terms and can get your product flagged
Using generic gallery images that do not show your actual product UI

faq.question: What is the best day to launch on Product Hunt?
faq.answer: Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday are the best days. These have the highest traffic. Avoid weekends when fewer people browse Product Hunt.

faq.question: What time should I launch?
faq.answer: Launch at 12:01 AM PT (Pacific Time). This is the start of the Product Hunt day and gives you the full 24 hours to accumulate upvotes.

faq.question: How many gallery images should I use?
faq.answer: Use up to 8 images. 5 is recommended. The first image is most important as it appears in the feed, email digest, and social shares.

faq.question: What are the tagline requirements?
faq.answer: 60 characters maximum, no period at the end. Must communicate what the product does AND why someone should care.

faq.question: When should I post my maker comment?
faq.answer: Post within 5 minutes of going live. This is your first pitch and sets the tone for engagement.

faq.question: Can I ask people to upvote my product?
faq.answer: No. Asking for upvotes directly violates Product Hunt terms of service and can get your product flagged. Share the link naturally and let the product speak for itself.
